# opnsense_syslog_destination (Resource)

Manages a syslog destination on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hostname` (String) Destination hostname or IP.
- `transport` (String) Transport: udp4, tcp4, udp6, tcp6, tls4, tls6.

### Optional

- `certificate` (String) Certificate reference for TLS transports.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this destination is enabled.
- `facility` (Set of String) Syslog facilities to forward (empty = all).
- `level` (Set of String) Log levels to forward (e.g. info, warn, error).
- `port` (Number) Destination port.
- `rfc5424` (Boolean) Use RFC 5424 message format.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
